# Secrets allowed in GitHub Actions workflows
# These are injected via 1Password Connect or Wrangler secrets
# Last reviewed: 2026-03-12

# CI/CD
CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID

# Deployment validation
NEON_DATABASE_URL

# GitHub App (webhook processing)
GITHUB_APP_ID
GITHUB_PRIVATE_KEY
GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET

# Code review (Claude Code Review workflow)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
